name: Vero Internet AS262272
notes:
Americanet is a Vero S/A company.

Fit Telecom is a "AmericaNet Group" company (ASN 28669) that offers a comprehensive portfolio of telecommunications products for B2C.

It operates in the Northwest region of the State of São Paulo, having its own ring backbone that connects Andradina, Guararapes, Araçatuba, Birigui, Penápolis, Avanhandava, Promissão, Guiçara, Lins, Pirajuí and Bauru; 
But we also interconnect São José do Rio Preto, Mirassol, Bálsamo, Tanabi, Votuporanga, Fernandópolis, Jales. 

"Assim Telecom" operates in the Southwest region of the State of São Paulo, with its own ring backbone that connects Presidente Epitácio, Presidente Venceslau, Santo Anastácio, Presidente Bernardes, Presidente Prudente, Martinópolis, Rancharia and Quatá. 
In addition to other small rings that connect Ribeirão dos Índios, Emilianópolis, Santo Expedito, Alfredo Marcondes, Caiuá and Piquerobi.

"Rede Telecom" operates in the Northwest region of the State of São Paulo, having its own ring backbone that connects Andradina, Três Lagoas, Ilha Solteira, Santa Fé, Jales.

We manage ASN 28263, 262272, 265079, 28245, 267591, 28287 and 53080.

"Fit Telecom" serves B2C. (ASN 262272, 53126 and 265079. New 28245 and 267591) [Assim and Netdigit were incorporated in 2020] "Rede Telecom" serves B2C. (ASN 53080, 270298, 264299 and 22706)

"Ensite Telecom" serves B2B. (ASN 28263).

AmericaNet is a mobile B2B B2C company. http://peeringdb.com/asn/28669

For Peering with us, contact AS28263.
